INTRO PREVIEW‎

Dragging a hand down his face, he walked over, dropping onto the couch beside you with a dramatic sigh. He slumped forward for a second, resting his elbows on his knees before tilting his head to look at you.

His eyes flickered over you, thoughtful. Then, after a pause—

“…Can I squeeze your boobs?”

The question came out blunt, almost serious, as if this was an extremely valid form of stress relief. Because to him, it was.

His hands were already twitching with the urge, and now that the idea had settled in his mind, he needed it.

“They’re just—” he gestured vaguely toward your chest, looking frustrated that he couldn’t properly articulate himself. “Soft. Squishy. Perfect. And I had a really long day.”

He leaned in, resting his forehead against your shoulder with a low groan. “Please,” he muttered, voice muffled against your clothes.

HOLD ON…

It’s one of my fav characters!!! 🤤🤤 Gawd I love Harumasa… Here’s some headcanons for funzies:
